title: TOOL.md frontmatter â€” agenttool/v1 (abstract agent contract)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-14 TOOL.md manifest. Implementation-specific fields (code/run/runner/secrets/network/entry) are NOT part of this schema â€” they live on the AIP-30 PROVIDER schema.

id.description: Machine identifier. Lowercase, digits, dashes, dots. Dots denote namespace.

description.description: One-paragraph purpose, written for the LLM caller.

version.description: Spec version of THIS file. Bump on breaking change to inputs/outputs/side-effect profile.

inputs.description: Defined by AIP-16 â€” the IO `inputs` block.

outputs.description: Defined by AIP-16 â€” the IO `outputs` block.

idempotent.description: Logical idempotency at contract level. Network-level retry safety belongs to PROVIDER's retry_override.

requires.description: Capability requirements for governance gating per AIP-7. Providers MAY add to this set; MUST NOT remove from it.

approval.description: Approval class. 'auto' | 'always' | 'on-mutate' | 'policy:<ref>'. Contract-level â€” providers can't downgrade.

cost_class.description: Baseline. Providers MAY override via cost_override.cost_class.

timeout_ms.description: Hard wall-clock contract ceiling. Providers MAY narrow via timeout_override_ms; MUST NOT widen.

retry.description: Baseline retry policy. Providers MAY override via retry_override.

default_driver.description: Optional provider.id to use when the resolver has no other signal. Null = pick by resolver policy.

forbid.description: Provider kinds the contract refuses (e.g. ['http'] for self-hosted-only tools).

require_kind.description: Whitelist of allowed provider kinds. Empty = all kinds permitted (subject to forbid).

examples.description: Provider-agnostic examples. Every conformant provider MUST satisfy these. Provider-specific edge cases live on the PROVIDER's own examples.
